requirement: Configure the IP address on R1's interface connecting to R4.

R1(config-if)# ip address 10.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
R1(config-if)# no shutdown
R1(config-if)# end

requirement: Configure an extended ACL on R1 to deny TCP traffic from 10.0.1.0/24 to any destination on port 23.
ground_truth:
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# ip access-list extended DENY_TELNET
R1(config-ext-nacl)# deny tcp 10.0.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 23
R1(config-ext-nacl)# permit ip any any
R1(config-ext-nacl)# end

requirement: Configure an extended ACL named DENY_TELNET on R1 to deny TCP traffic from 10.0.1.0/24 to any on port 23, permit all other traffic, and apply it inbound on R1's interface connected to SW1.
ground_truth:
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# ip access-list extended DENY_TELNET
R1(config-ext-nacl)# deny tcp 10.0.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 23
R1(config-ext-nacl)# permit ip any any
R1(config-ext-nacl)# exit
R1(config)# interface Ethernet0/0
R1(config-if)# ip access-group DENY_TELNET in
R1(config-if)# end

requirement: Configure a standard ACL on R3 to permit traffic only from the 10.0.2.0/24 network.
ground_truth:
R3# configure terminal
R3(config)# ip access-list standard PERMIT_LAN2
R3(config-std-nacl)# permit 10.0.2.0 0.0.0.255
R3(config-std-nacl)# end

requirement: Configure an extended ACL on R4 to deny ICMP traffic from any source to 10.0.14.0/24.
ground_truth:
R4# configure terminal
R4(config)# ip access-list extended DENY_ICMP_R4
R4(config-ext-nacl)# deny icmp any 10.0.14.0 0.0.0.255
R4(config-ext-nacl)# permit ip any any
R4(config-ext-nacl)# end

R3(config)# end

SW2(config)# end

requirement: Configure the trunk port on SW1 to allow only VLAN 10 and VLAN 20, and add VLAN 20 to SW1.
ground_truth:
SW1# configure terminal
SW1(config)# vlan 20
SW1(config-vlan)# exit
SW1(config)# interface Fa0/24
SW1(config-if)# switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20
SW1(config-if)# end

requirement: Configure port security on SW2's port connected to h2 to allow a maximum of 2 MAC addresses.
ground_truth:

SW2(config-if)# switchport port-security violation restrict
SW2(config-if)# end
